creator: gslin@gslin.org
text:
Your patch uses @dirrm instead of @dirrmtry. This will cause error when
 pkg_delete.
 
 On Tue, Dec 15, 2009 at 06:41:02AM +0000, Philip M. Gollucci wrote:
 > 
 > >Submitter-Id:	current-users
 > >Originator:	Philip M. Gollucci
 > >Organization:	RideCharge Inc.
 > >Confidential:	no 
 > >Synopsis:	[PATCH] net/p5-Net-Cassandra: update to 0.34
 > >Severity:	non-critical
 > >Priority:	low
 > >Category:	ports 
 > >Class:		update
 > >Release:	FreeBSD 9.0-CURRENT amd64
 > >Environment:
 > System: FreeBSD frieza.p6m7g8.net 9.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 9.0-CURRENT #0: Tue Dec  8 02:25:55 UTC
 > >Description:
 > - Update to 0.34
 > 
 > Port maintainer (gslin@gslin.org) is cc'd.
 > 
 > Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99
 > >How-To-Repeat:
 > >Fix:
 > 
 > --- p5-Net-Cassandra-0.34.patch begins here ---
 > Index: Makefile
 > ===================================================================

 > retrieving revision 1.1

 > +++ distinfo	14 Dec 2009 06:40:53 -0000
 > @@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 > -MD5 (Net-Cassandra-0.33.tar.gz) = 62a69007d46e3a2e33a5d4882f13b939
 > -SHA256 (Net-Cassandra-0.33.tar.gz) = 78b2cfa509d2263fa7405f6c63ba11be2df38ad87bf1f4da81ae5be43ace692a

 > +++ pkg-plist	14 Dec 2009 20:29:06 -0000
 > @@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
 > +%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Net/Cassandra/.packlist
